fields.accessTokenEdit: New token (leave empty to keep current)

accounts.whereHint: In Meta for Developers → Your app → WhatsApp → API Setup
accounts.disconnectDescription: Are you sure? The account and all routing rules will be deleted.

embedded.title: Connect your WhatsApp Business
embedded.description: Sign in with your Facebook account to securely connect your WhatsApp Business. We handle the rest.

errors.notConfigured: Assisted connection isn't available right now. Contact support.
errors.sdkUnavailable: Couldn't load Facebook sign-in. Please try again.
errors.noSessionInfo: We didn't receive your WhatsApp account data. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong connecting to Facebook. Please try again.

routing.autoAssignDescription: One number for all branches. The bot asks which branch the customer wants to order from.

business.sectionDescription: One number for all branches. Customers will choose their branch when placing an order.
